title: VanillaIshPack
description: This resource pack includes only the essentials for SMP, Singleplayer, and pretty much every PvP gamemode.
body: A simple vanilla-ish resource pack for PvP, survival, smp, and FFA. The pack includes smaller crit particles, no pumpkin overlay, ore borders, dark mode, no enchanted hit particles, no explosion particles, and much more to optimize your Minecraft experience. Also, the images in the gallery might be a bit outdated since I'm constantly updating them.
